name: Lisa Scheller Campaign
subject: LISA SCHELLER STATEMENT ON CORONAVIRUS SENATE VOTE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Republican Congressional candidate Lisa Scheller tonight issued the following
statement on the decision by Senate Democrats to block passage of a $2 t

LISA SCHELLER ISSUES STATEMENT ON CORONAVIRUS SENATE VOTE

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Contact:

Dennis Roddy

press@schellerforcongress.com

March 22, 2020

ALLENTOWN, Pa. – Republican Congressional candidate Lisa Scheller tonight
issued the following statement on the decision by Senate Democrats to block
passage of a $2 trillion stimulus package intended to prevent a recession
amidst the economic slowdown triggered by the coronavirus pandemic:

“It is beyond comprehension that the Democrats would play politics with the
livelihoods of tens of millions of Americans whose economic survival hinges on
the passage of the stimulus package. The Republican leadership has set aside
partisanship and ideology in its move to save American employers and workers.
To have this thrown back in their face in the name of political maneuvering is
an insult to working families of the 7th Congressional District and across the
nation."

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s cynical announcement that she would introduce
her own version of a stimulus bill signaled the likelihood of a Democrat stall
that could plunge the United States into a recession or even a depression. It
is important that Pelosi ally Susan Wild indicate whether she would support the
Pelosi tactic or stand with working families in the 7th District and work to
get the existing stimulus package enacted. This issue should be beyond petty
politics. Lives and livelihoods are at stake. Will Susan Wild stand up for the
people of the 7th Congressional District or side with Nancy Pelosi and her
radical agenda, again?”

###

Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

subject: Coronavirus Update
body:
As Iowans working together, we will defeat this virus.

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489

https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489
Good evening

It's been a different kind of week. I was reminded of the feeling after 9/11 when I realized there was no planes flying overhead. Today many businesses are closed and traffic on the roads is very limited. It is an eerie feeling of not knowing what's next to enter our lives.

Do you remember when President Bush grabbed the bullhorn on top of the rubble or when he threw out the first pitch in Yankee Stadium? You could feel the patriotism swelling across our nation. We came together as one after 9/11. Because of that, I know we can certainly handle COVID-19.

Let's put politics aside for a few weeks and voluntarily limit our contact with others. Social distancing has been and will be an obstacle for our grassroots campaign, but it is the only way to reduce the spread of this virus. There are moments in the coming days that will make us proud to be an American. When neighbors will come together to assist the elderly or support the family down the road. Think about the cashiers and truck drivers who are all putting themselves at risk to ensure we have food and daily necessities.

President Trump has risen to this challenge and I believe no other president could have brought private enterprise together to work with the federal and state government like he has. He has let the governors decide what is right for their states. This is the way our federal system of government should work. It is part of the system of checks and balances that prevents a centralized government from taking away our rights. This time of emergency will soon pass and I am looking forward to resuming normal life.

In some personal news, a few of you know that my mother was hospitalized last week with a nasty cough and a fever. Of course, it was not lost on our family that she may be the first case of coronavirus in Shelby County. It's been a sleepless week for me, but I am happy to report that after waiting several days her test results came back negative. She was diagnosed with pneumonia and is thankfully recovering.

But due to an abundance of caution and doctor's orders, our campaign team was instructed to self-isolate and do some deep cleaning. It was good to spend time with my family as all figure out how to deal with the pandemic on a personal level.

I would like to thank all health care professionals who are taking care of their friends and neighbors during a time when they would much rather be at home with their loved ones. As the board chair of a hospital, I've seen this personal sacrifice on a daily basis and I thank you.

I know we as a nation will get through this together.

May God continue to watch over you and bless our great country

LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489)
CONTRIBUTE $10 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,

Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489) we still need your help!

Serve as a neighborhood team captain? Know a good place for a barn sign? Send an email to volunteer@richardsforcongress.com (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=5ebbc50553&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489) to lend a hand!

Be sure to like us on Facebook (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489) and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/richards4iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489) and Instagram (http://instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b5ffad9447-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b5ffad9447-25822489) to stay up to date!

name: Claire Chase
subject: Coronavirus Resources
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Df0C1SXBMIRbEuA1UTAFDKbFxQzO5gvJ2nBDA3H7_Li9wbFekkpq_WL9T3rpB9gEBZU_0P9a3tuXexwZ2p1pmEx6-WdrAoZGS50AgJOtY3nVwd7lEBnfEcCku0-ZmZKvAoVQIkkfITMMFnXFSKqqUw==&c=lueMJ3PcFP645HEdkL3EEdNCzqZSoqBhm8uqHEHzB1C9VKKJMuuqqw==&ch=odtzEBn7lJ6I4usiNsMLr7L8q4Nq8Uk2alkIIj-xtXahTixkmACtFQ==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Over the past few weeks, watching our families and communities come together to face this crisis reaffirms what I have known for all of my life: there is no community as brave and resilient as New Mexico.
My team spent the last few days compiling some useful resources on the coronavirus. I hope these prove helpful for you and your loved ones.

name: Team Eugene
subject: Protecting the ACA is more important now than ever before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Today marks the 10 year anniversary of President Obama signing the Affordable Care Act into law. In light of the current situation with COVID-19, it’s clearer now than ever before that every American ought to have access to quality, affordable health care.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16412691/174335990/-415958285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWY0NjFlYS0xNzZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5Mito_LJUByVCnRFxzuYINLuoBA5pui7Mz5DF13RRg=&emci=9d0417a6-0d6d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=5ef461ea-176d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) _We know that the COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please do not feel pressured to contribute to our campaign, but if you’re able to, we’d greatly appreciate your generosity._ _We hope you join us in fighting to protect the Affordable Care Act -- a critical piece of legislation that has helped millions attain health insurance._
* * *
**Team -- Today marks the 10 year anniversary of President Obama signing the Affordable Care Act into law.** In light of the current situation with COVID-19, it’s clearer now than ever before that every American ought to have access to quality, affordable health care. [**Add your name if you agree that every American deserves access to quality, affordable health care >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16412692/174335991/-415958285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWY0NjFlYS0xNzZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5Mito_LJUByVCnRFxzuYINLuoBA5pui7Mz5DF13RRg=&emci=9d0417a6-0d6d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=5ef461ea-176d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) | **[Protect the ACA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16412693/174335992/-415958285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWY0NjFlYS0xNzZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5Mito_LJUByVCnRFxzuYINLuoBA5pui7Mz5DF13RRg=&emci=9d0417a6-0d6d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=5ef461ea-176d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)**
---

It’s the Affordable Care Act that created protections for people with pre-existing conditions, allowed young people to stay on their parents' health insurance plans until the age of 26, and required all insurance companies to cover certain essential benefits, such as preventative and wellness visits, and so much more.

**But, team, the Affordable Care Act remains under attack by right-wing lawsuits and legislative action, threatening the health care of millions of Americans._Now is not the time to play politics with our health care._**

[**Will you sign our petition to protect the Affordable Care Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16412694/174335993/193864196?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWY0NjFlYS0xNzZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5Mito_LJUByVCnRFxzuYINLuoBA5pui7Mz5DF13RRg=&emci=9d0417a6-0d6d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=5ef461ea-176d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)
**[Protect the ACA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16412695/174335994/-415958285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWY0NjFlYS0xNzZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5Mito_LJUByVCnRFxzuYINLuoBA5pui7Mz5DF13RRg=&emci=9d0417a6-0d6d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=5ef461ea-176d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)**
---

South Central Pennsylvanians deserve a proven leader like Eugene who will fight to address the tough issues facing our community. In Congress, Eugene will work to tackle the skyrocketing costs of health care, stand up to Big Pharma to lower the prices of prescription drugs, and improve our public health system.

Thank you for standing with Eugene on this important issue.

clean_body: Today marks the 10 year anniversary of President Obama signing the Affordable Care Act into law. In light of the current situation with COVID-19, it’s clearer now than ever before that every American ought to have access to quality, affordable health care. We know that the COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please do not feel pressured to contribute to our campaign, but if you’re able to, we’d greatly appreciate your generosity. We hope you join us in fighting to protect the Affordable Care Act -- a critical piece of legislation that has helped millions attain health insurance. Team -- Today marks the 10 year anniversary of President Obama signing the Affordable Care Act into law. In light of the current situation with COVID-19, it’s clearer now than ever before that every American ought to have access to quality, affordable health care. | It’s the Affordable Care Act that created protections for people with pre-existing conditions, allowed young people to stay on their parents' health insurance plans until the age of 26, and required all insurance companies to cover certain essential benefits, such as preventative and wellness visits, and so much more. But, team, the Affordable Care Act remains under attack by right-wing lawsuits and legislative action, threatening the health care of millions of Americans.Now is not the time to play politics with our health care. South Central Pennsylvanians deserve a proven leader like Eugene who will fight to address the tough issues facing our community. In Congress, Eugene will work to tackle the skyrocketing costs of health care, stand up to Big Pharma to lower the prices of prescription drugs, and improve our public health system. Thank you for standing with Eugene on this important issue. \--Team Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: | =** Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. name: Jill Vogel
subject: March 24th Town Hall Meeting on COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Please join me tomorrow, Tuesday, March 24th, for a virtual town hall to discuss the COVID-19 pandemic.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,
Please join me tomorrow, Tuesday, March 24th, for a virtual town hall to discuss the COVID-19 pandemic.
I will be joined by my colleagues Delegate Elizabeth Guzman, Delegate Joshua Cole and Delegate Michael Webbert, along with Dr. Wade Kartchner from the Virginia Department of Health. We will respond to questions from our community and discuss current developments in the effort to combat the spread of the coronavirus in our region.
Please submit questions for the town hall to [DelEGuzman@House.Virignia.Gov](mailto:DelEGuzman@House.Virignia.Gov) before 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday March 24th.
TOWN HALL DETAILS
Date: Tuesday, March 24th, 2020 Time: 6:00 p.m. - 6:45 p.m. Location: [https://tinyurl.com/COVID19TownHall](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qpfNugNpjKfW3_TzDyuLCyqryk33Kq1f5pg58uL9rsofotM0oFn_CFT6RZNsMBBBaAtMhFUEsZYhOD7tY3yVRwny2OhRV6I1JgsPx8cMGxiLckn72uPX-ulll2auJO_gGHT5ttheHapWaEj_BOISAexjcciCcN84&c=Q18M9mOn4h0rk-sL5vbkPaA4JM91NBzmhbYE6Tyv1XaSE7lWD1FSDA==&ch=FRGUTj1QFN6BJSLsrN62cgAzMG-uBD-WRI_9syXqfy8oz1YCkg6dww==)

| Derek, Earlier this year, I reached out to you with your _**downloadable New Hampshire Republican Party 2020 sustaining membership Card**._ In reviewing our records last night I noticed that we had not received your 2020 Sustaining Membership contribution.

---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgzMjY3NjA3OTMwNDc1Nzk5JmM9YzRoMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzA2MjQ4OTgmZD1yOW8zdDN4.t02IMG9ogqQgMxQkLkDfdmvP7OL7ONQN9X17CKPJoZs)

| With our successful First-In-the-Nation Presidential primary concluded, and with President Trump receiving the most votes of any incumbent, our race is shifting towards supporting our slate of Republican candidates. **[It's critical we have 17 more Republicans renew their membership tonight to reach our aggressive fundraising goal.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgzMjY3NjA3OTMwNDc1Nzk5JmM9YzRoMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzA2MjQ5MDAmZD1zOGU3eDZw.T70WlneWeMeaI5dOMLPEu7k8mRD-qmYQaBnzyMGx448)** Our NH Senate race could very well determine who controls the US Senate in 2021 and beyond. President Trump has already confirmed a record number of judges. We need a US Senator that will confirm the President’s nominees who will interpret the Constitution as written. [**Will you make your 2020 sustaining membership contribution today with your downloadable membership card?**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgzMjY3NjA3OTMwNDc1Nzk5JmM9YzRoMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzA2MjQ5MDImZD1nMW42ZjNv.fsAPigQ6CefxVsrbb9WhUtS9Ki5hPBDZregjO6dPEow) Your membership is as important now as ever. Thank you,
Stephen Stepanek, Chairman
New Hampshire Republican Party

name: Maya Handa, Digital Organizing Director
subject: Introducing myself at a strange time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
I want to introduce myself. I’m Maya, Mondaire’s new Digital Organizing Director. I’m originally from North Carolina, but most recently I was a member of Elizabeth Warren’s digital team in Iowa and then led her digital operation in Wisconsin. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.30b/laRIOO9fQEevNO0nnOsc7w/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKM7024SZSz-2BSvq39CpCTBd-2FmX6vRZFHgRP-2BR3nDH3rddIQMqD35FhAmFEAKj-2FVQBf85wWh28f1JwuxilVp8lc3jMUCUV-2BZ3CIm-2FJKEAjwZQoOkZ1TKjLm5k9V8rewmeLxSZjGAVAK0tDbGraW06tnnFdrnTvAvRE8AekRg8MDOMz3e-2FzPeyOjLAJxZKBTBGS7BbKF3bjKWpFwphru3WqLljehEMZ8m-2F9oa06qLl1CkEwq7I3eRyYK0dpzyUxtotS0-3D/YSAw) Friend, I want to introduce myself. I’m Maya, Mondaire’s new Digital Organizing Director. I’m originally from North Carolina, but most recently I was a member of Elizabeth Warren’s digital team in Iowa and then led her digital operation in Wisconsin. I’m incredibly excited to keep fighting for a candidate who shares Elizabeth’s values (and received her endorsement!). I’m joining the team during an uncertain time in our history, but one thing remains clear: now, more than ever, we need leadership that is not afraid to invest in our future.
I’m here because Mondaire knows that during this crisis, we must find new ways to bring our community together. **_[Whether it’s building a phone tree, sending texts, or hosting virtual town halls, you’re crucial to this movement. Will you join us?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.30b/laRIOO9fQEevNO0nnOsc7w/h1/I3pn4SJUQx-2BiuYuahoeeGpCNwsA61TlCqR0-2BMwBys1He-2FuqUjF3anrvAcxNTdtWqzfpQA0q44Qhk2dbxGt0-2BTaYGN7PXC4vMdNSYS0zZeX-2Fpl78j54FmL4xJT9UA1pKUOJoBqIkBybexGHcqNKGKGi1pn4cZy9YxUpLHcIGlmODINfcRZ-2FsfWS0BeHMff8VmlzZdEFr5xKXGQTDTw2hvxQVeu5sVbo7LvtmYZolNL5YFcekIqfKWXuNBsbQtg00Pq7x8kj2zAaWvlomw-2F9-2BouTcq2Xxf-2B8AFS6fY-2FWExZgL5pZNlkZ4hJ9ccMWZXE7vr/lvPS)_**
It’s natural to feel overwhelmed at a moment like this, but we must channel our energy, get creative, and keep fighting for leadership that will take bold action for our community. **_[Sign up to volunteer for Mondaire now-- we can’t do this without you.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.30b/laRIOO9fQEevNO0nnOsc7w/h2/I3pn4SJUQx-2BiuYuahoeeGpCNwsA61TlCqR0-2BMwBys1He-2FuqUjF3anrvAcxNTdtWq00-2FXNomZEitXua-2B2kyS4FlINKmk1KS-2FXwYyDh8Rpqin-2BgRVthJkF3GPUk1X5xwePSV6c-2B7JX-2BUvVguwA7WD-2BVX5Iz1MBTLRzoQkUiNO-2FL-2BHO8iAsbh8vLF1D4a4GpxOI6i7bxSggmYiBftojYIj3COVu8rBMrO1YM6rkMgLr-2BsinJUUBwyrTyicjqOnz6tsyIrDlC1lGrZt31Qss9zWLCKh33CF2tvz60zIoBhSfOG6iHKOwb5CeaFp-2FzjEAhgJm/w55d)_**
We will get through this together. Don’t hesitate to reach out with ideas or questions about how to get involved.
Maya

clean_body: I want to introduce myself. I’m Maya, Mondaire’s new Digital Organizing Director. I’m originally from North Carolina, but most recently I was a member of Elizabeth Warren’s digital team in Iowa and then led her digital operation in Wisconsin. | | | Friend, I want to introduce myself. I’m Maya, Mondaire’s new Digital Organizing Director. I’m originally from North Carolina, but most recently I was a member of Elizabeth Warren’s digital team in Iowa and then led her digital operation in Wisconsin. I’m incredibly excited to keep fighting for a candidate who shares Elizabeth’s values (and received her endorsement!). I’m joining the team during an uncertain time in our history, but one thing remains clear: now, more than ever, we need leadership that is not afraid to invest in our future. I’m here because Mondaire knows that during this crisis, we must find new ways to bring our community together. It’s natural to feel overwhelmed at a moment like this, but we must channel our energy, get creative, and keep fighting for leadership that will take bold action for our community. We will get through this together. Don’t hesitate to reach out with ideas or questions about how to get involved. Maya P.S. Innovation requires resources— | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Help American workers, not Chinese Communists
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
We are facing an unprecedented challenge with the outbreak of the Coronavirus. We are lucky to have such dedicated doctors, nurses, and healthcare professionals across the country who are on the front lines fighting this epidemic.
I have been in constant communication with local, state, and federal officials as we try to halt the spread of the Coronavirus and provide relief to the people who are suffering, both physically and economically.
I want to assure you that I am fighting for you. That means no bailouts to corporations with Chinese ownership that operate on our soil! Every nickel in aid relief should go to American workers who are struggling to make ends meet during these trying times.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010xL4P9K8O19AFyLWrS6mHft9U7vaVBuHeDhunx05JiWTrZBc7ntMmbA7mAAZmIVLSysoh4uKiL2bl8qmZ9b5ItsY06Flq-n3WFPcWzlWnqSpq09rI58E5eHP_08iPHIEtwgsDK2BVw_9nQromFLoULT02PCzfIELMnDIydc_NmQGcCw3Pzm64fwB-zOaWRSXCKKzTCw-K3E=&c=CqGwpEcz6OaR3itr9R293P3hd80dZSraogqpSAibF4f76ThHpcM5_Q==&ch=38z2KuXDj2_A2un9jcp5HLpy8J0kKJzaH5VdT5B00CZ2Gr7Cid_NgA==)
---
| I work for you, the American people. Not huge international corporations (with Chinese ownership) or special interest groups that try to take advantage of American taxpayers. I'm fighting to make sure relief will be sent to the people on the ground who are actually suffering.
Together, we will get through this crisis. I'm confident in the spirit of the American people and the expertise of our healthcare professionals to stop the Coronavirus in its tracks.
Stay strong.

God bless America,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz
---

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Sign the petition: Vote by mail for everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2eb01/6cd27893/53875947/1590474d/2702756118/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | In Oregon, we've been voting by mail for 20 years. You get three weeks to vote. You can do it in your PJs. You get the time to study the issues and the candidates. No one has to stand in line at polling places. And we have one of the highest voter turnouts in the nation. Universal vote-by-mail is a great idea in the best of times. **But right now, in the midst of the coronavirus crisis, vote-by-mail is critical for the health of all Americans -- and the health of our democracy. **[**Sign my petition to demand universal vote-by-mail in 2020.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2eb01/6cd27893/53875947/1590474a/2702756118/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/vote-by-mail-covid/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-03-vote-by-mail-covid-email") We need emergency legislation to ensure that the 2020 election is accessible to every single American who wants to vote by mail. We don't know what path the coronavirus outbreak could take. But a resurgence of the virus in the fall cold weather is entirely possible -- and we have to ensure that the 2020 election happens, happens safely, and includes every eligible voter. We simply cannot require millions of Americans -- including medical first responders and the sick -- to stand in long lines waiting to vote. This coronavirus situation is fluid. **Your support, right now, on this petition will make a critical difference at this critical time. Help me tell my colleagues that tens of thousands of Americans are demanding universal vote-by-mail.** [**SIGN THE PETITION:**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2eb01/6cd27893/53875947/1590474a/2702756118/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/vote-by-mail-covid/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-03-vote-by-mail-covid-email") **[Tell Congress: We need universal vote-by-mail in 2020.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2eb01/6cd27893/53875947/1590474a/2702756118/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/vote-by-mail-covid/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-03-vote-by-mail-covid-email")** Onward, _Jeff_ |
---|---|---

name: Cory Booker
subject: A quick update about COVID-19 and one easy way to make a difference.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
Let's look out for each other in this time of need.
| | |
---
| Friends, I've always drawn strength during times of adversity from the power of community and love. I'm writing today to check in with everyone on this incredible team, and share with you an easy way to help make a difference as our nation grapples with this unprecedented health emergency. These are trying times for our country and for the entire world, but I'm lifted knowing that we are in this together and by seeing examples everywhere of people helping others during this crisis. One of the most critical ways we can make a difference is by caring for the most vulnerable among us. Those who have fallen ill or who are supporting members of their families who have. Those who are working overtime in our hospitals, grocery stores, and pharmacies. Those who are temporarily or for the foreseeable future economically impacted by social distancing measures we're all relying on. All of whom could use our help right now. **As this crisis continues, an important priority is making sure that no one goes hungry. Food banks across the country are seeing an increase in demand, but a decrease in food supplies. At the moment, food insecurity is a serious problem in many communities -- and one of the best ways to help our neighbors is by supporting local food banks.** [**If you 're financially able, please make a donation to the Community FoodBank of New Jersey. Any amount will make a difference, and it's as easy as just clicking below:**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f90/5fca0d19/7a5ffb9f/291d1e4e/413201769/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-covid-foodbanknj?refcode=200323-em-cfbnj") **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f90/5fca0d19/7a5ffb9f/291d1e4e/413201769/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-covid-foodbanknj?refcode=200323-em-cfbnj")** Time and again we have proven to ourselves and each other that the power of love can unite us even in our darkest days. Concerts, sporting events, schools, and more are being canceled and closed. Kindness, decency, generosity, grace, and love must never be. My advice is this: look out for each other, check in on your friends, family, and neighbors. Remember that we are all in this with each other, and that's exactly how we'll meet this challenge: together. Stay safe out there. Cory P.S. We know this is a difficult time for many folks. Please only give if you're able to at this time. If you'd like to receive less emails during this public health crisis, [**please click here.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f90/5fca0d19/7a5ffb9f/291d1e4d/413201769/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails")
---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f90/5fca0d19/7a5ffb9f/291d1e4c/413201769/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f90/5fca0d19/7a5ffb9f/291d1e4b/413201769/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f90/5fca0d19/7a5ffb9f/291d1e4a/413201769/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f90/5fca0d19/7a5ffb9f/291d1e49/413201769/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Democrats Sink Senate Coronavirus Stimulus Plan to Give Cash to Families
body:
“This national crisis is not going to wait around if Congress slips back into conventional politics or haggles endlessly over the finer points.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39fb33a18c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Democrats Sink Senate Coronavirus Stimulus Plan to Give Cash to Families**

“Congress was unable to reach an agreement Sunday on a $1 trillion-plus stimulus package that gives cash to families and keeps small businesses afloat during the COVID-19 pandemic,” Tom Howell Jr. writes in _The Washington Times_.

“This national crisis is not going to wait around if Congress slips back into conventional politics or haggles endlessly over the finer points,” Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=248fb2351e&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Third Time's a Charm”:**[NYT Changes Headline on Failed Relief Bill ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db5435f609&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Many procedures are urgent and must be done even in the midst of a global pandemic.” But elective procedures, which are often scheduled weeks in advance and can be postponed without causing great harm, are different. “Until we can flatten the COVID-19 curve in the United States—please consider delaying your elective procedures,” U.S. Surgeon General Jerome Adams writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5ea537bb4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump has promised to unite the full force of the federal government with the full power of American enterprise to respond to the China Wuhan virus—and the response from the private sector has been overwhelming.” Businesses and manufacturers across America are stepping up to help confront the Coronavirus crisis, White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=028bac8010&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| This weekend, CNN argued that the global virus pandemic is not the fault of the Chinese Communist Party, but rather of “‘human activity.’ The big winner in this bizarre way of telling the story is China, which is launching a furious disinformation campaign to distance itself from blame for the pandemic,” David Marcus writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7992ee565&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

clean_body: “This national crisis is not going to wait around if Congress slips back into conventional politics or haggles endlessly over the finer points.” | | | | | | | Democrats Sink Senate Coronavirus Stimulus Plan to Give Cash to Families “Congress was unable to reach an agreement Sunday on a $1 trillion-plus stimulus package that gives cash to families and keeps small businesses afloat during the COVID-19 pandemic,” Tom Howell Jr. writes in The Washington Times. “This national crisis is not going to wait around if Congress slips back into conventional politics or haggles endlessly over the finer points,” Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) said. “Third Time's a Charm”: | | “Many procedures are urgent and must be done even in the midst of a global pandemic.” But elective procedures, which are often scheduled weeks in advance and can be postponed without causing great harm, are different. “Until we can flatten the COVID-19 curve in the United States—please consider delaying your elective procedures,” U.S. Surgeon General Jerome Adams writes in . | | “President Trump has promised to unite the full force of the federal government with the full power of American enterprise to respond to the China Wuhan virus—and the response from the private sector has been overwhelming.” Businesses and manufacturers across America are stepping up to help confront the Coronavirus crisis, White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes in . | | This weekend, CNN argued that the global virus pandemic is not the fault of the Chinese Communist Party, but rather of “‘human activity.’ The big winner in this bizarre way of telling the story is China, which is launching a furious disinformation campaign to distance itself from blame for the pandemic,” David Marcus writes in . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

Do you have questions about how the City of San Diego is addressing COVID-19? **Tonight, Georgette and other city leaders will participate in a Telephone Town Hall, and they want to hear from you.**

Along with answering your questions, the leadership team will discuss updates on steps the city is taking to slow the spread -- including the status of essential services, the stay at home order, temporary bans on evictions, utility and tax suspensions, small business loans, and more.

**We hope you will participate in this informative call, and forward this email to your friends and neighbors. Please submit your questions via email today by 4pm PT.** _**TELEPHONE TOWN HALL: COVID-19**_

Monday, March 23, 5:30 pm PT

City Council President Georgette Gómez
Mayor Kevin Faulconer

Congressmember Scott Peters
Local public health officials

[_SanDiegoCovid19Townhall@gmail.com_](mailto:SanDiegoCovid19Townhall@gmail.com)

**At 5:30 pm, dial in here:**
Dial (712) 832-8700 and enter pin 416802#
_T-Mobile users: 712-832-5558_
Thank you,

_Team Gómez_

_ _

body:
I hope that you are all staying safe and finding ways to enjoy being closer with family in a time like this. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/iowa-strong?e=90fad69796)

| |

|
---
| |
# **_My Fellow_**** _Iowans_**
I hope that you are all staying safe and finding ways to enjoy being closer with family in a time like this. With all events and gatherings and meet and greets cancelled, I’d still like to create a forum of discussion to answer any questions my constituents might have. **We will do this in the format of a Facebook Town Hall live on Thursdays at 7pm. **Please feel free to join in and ask any questions that you might have in the comments section! And if you could share this info with your friends and family, it would be greatly appreciated.

Also, with the concerns of community spread, our campaign is thinking proactively to prevent any further spread of this deadly disease. This is why we would like to offer information from the Secretary of State website on the absentee ballot process, which can be found [HERE](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=bc45212888&e=90fad69796). Early voting begins on May 4th!

For Iowa, Stay Safe!

\- Bobby Schilling

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: Pelosi's "relief" bill is indefensible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o70WrrFka3gIrkZxwzp5uLn9cLjsnmTRJWRQmV05-z0cRa3XXXzihJ1ECQRC8jKOeCF-hDUviQeFNlY4n-1LauvXr6EPQ13YCF4iWyyA6wY_88s4ucGhwIrp27ERXgKkS_d8-xJtG8JGwyd_cR6Vw0th9fo2lNIE7iqyPCVobrqy8NIQyG7Leg==&c=1vE6PS3IxUSbNK2uNLJ1ciEfVe7Kv1Atgjz3Bt-DsISNvYKUoalVyg==&ch=MW5sg7NpSJRrAhgPtHEwXioCncYeznSjkWEE7NZYW9c_UZArjRXing==)
---
| Peter,
In a time when Americans are coming together and doing their part to flatten the curve of COVID-19, the information that has come out about Speaker Pelosi's "relief bill" is INDEFENSIBLE.
My goal is not to play partisan politics, but I cannot hide my shock and disappointment in this Congress and how they are trying to stuff this trillion dollar package with special interest and far-left projects.
Our country needs decisive and calm action. Action that puts Americans first, puts their needs for access to tests, access to hospital beds, access to food, access to money and jobs FIRST. I am truly heartbroken by this Democratic leadership taking advantage of the stimulus bill and more importantly STALLING in fulfilling the needs of hardworking Americans.
This is not a time for party politics. This is a time for rational, compassionate, transparent communication and action. I will always pledge that to you. You deserve it.
For those who are struggling to find resources to food, jobs or basic accommodations, my team and I are working to identify all those resources and get them out to you this week. Texans are strong and we will not break. It is my goal to ensure you have the honest information about what is coming and how you can take advantage of it. I am here to help. Lean on us to be your resource for information.
I am with you and we will get through this together...but not through partisanship.
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins Candidate for Congressional District 32
---

name: MJ Hegar
subject: That's not ok with me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Senator John Cornyn has spent nearly 20 years in Washington putting special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell ahead of the Texans he's supposed to serve.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed1b/2155650173/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter, Running for Senate wasn't the obvious path for me. I'm not a career politician, I have young kids at home, and honestly, most of what happens in Washington makes me really mad. So I want to tell you a little more about why I decided to get into this race (**[if you're already on board, you can make a donation here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed1a/2155650173/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200320.2nd__1089__&amount=10&recurring=true")**). Senator John Cornyn has spent nearly 20 years in Washington putting special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell ahead of the Texans he's supposed to serve. Now he has more than $12 million in a war chest thanks to help from Big Pharma, the gun lobby, and the private prison industry -- and groups like the Koch network are spending big to support him, too. **I don't expect Sen. Cornyn to start putting Texans first anytime soon. That's why I had to get into the race.**[Will you pitch in now to help us win the runoff and head into the general election campaign in the strongest position possible?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed1a/2155650173/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200320.2nd__1089__&amount=10&recurring=true") **** Just in the last few years, Sen. Cornyn has voted to rip health care away from millions of Texans, opposed a bill to lower prescription drug prices, and stood in the way of any meaningful action on gun safety -- including basic measures that the vast majority of Texans approve of -- even after multiple mass shootings in our own state. That's not ok with me -- and I intend to do things differently. I will fight for you tooth and nail every single day, and my votes will always be based on what's best for Texans, not who's writing the biggest checks. As the only political outsider in the race and a working mom who has personally faced the struggles working families deal with every single day, you can be sure of that.

****[If you're ready for a senator who will put you first, I need you to pitch in so we can build the campaign we need to win.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed1a/2155650173/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200320.2nd__1089__&amount=10&recurring=true")**** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed19/2155650173/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200320.2nd__1089__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed18/2155650173/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200320.2nd__1089__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed1f/2155650173/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200320.2nd__1089__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed1e/2155650173/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200320.2nd__1089__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed1d/2155650173/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200320.2nd__1089__")**

Thanks for all that you do,
MJ Hegar

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed1a/2155650173/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200320.2nd__1089__&amount=10&recurring=true")

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas, and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed1c/2155650173/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1089&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ec/7f51f7bc/4c21794a/4ef1ed13/2155650173/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

body:

| |

| |
# Support these 4 Progressive Women in 2020.
10 days ago, I sent you an email about how Democratic women from Illinois will be helping to lead the charge in both defending and expanding the Democratic majority in Congress this November.

There are 4 women running competitive races for Congress against anti-choice, anti-women opponents in Illinois.**Lauren Underwood, Betsy Dirksen Londrigan, Marie Newman, and myself, Dani Brzozowski. **

**We are over halfway to our goal of $8,000 raised for the 4 of us** , and you can [chip in today to show your support and get us to our goal.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=34f37c3d86&e=140a9b81e7)

Make your contribution [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=66f682bfa1&e=140a9b81e7) through Women Count.

You can also donate [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c0038e62a5&e=140a9b81e7) through Act Blue!

Dani Brzozowski

name: Team Booker
subject: The bottom line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
To be honest with you, we’re not sure if we’ll hit this goal in time. It’s going to take a team effort these next couple of days if we want to catch up and get back on pace.
#
We need your help.
We're asking our grassroots community to raise $20,000 by next Tuesday, the biggest fundraising deadline of the campaign.
To be honest with you, with the way our fundraising numbers have been looking, _we’re not sure if we’ll hit this goal in time._ It’s going to take a team effort these next couple of days if we want to catch up and get back on pace.
[**If everyone reading this email chips in $5 — we can pull this off (seriously that’s all it takes to help).**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16427944/174485031/198088406?refcode=em20200323&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGY1YWM1ZC00ZjZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0CrnI8LmFydodepZZIUS8ag3BZcJNr33NsRZU3IIr4Q=)
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16427945/174485032/198088406?refcode=em20200323&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGY1YWM1ZC00ZjZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0CrnI8LmFydodepZZIUS8ag3BZcJNr33NsRZU3IIr4Q=)****
**Reaching this goal is critical to the future of our campaign and our chances to defeat Mitch.**
**We've only gotten this far thanks to generous supporters like you, but we're going to need our supporters to step up again if we want to keep fighting. **
****The bottom line is that we can’t afford to not reach this goal.****
* Now that the election has been pushed one month later, our campaign needs more resources than we anticipated to fight through this primary
* **The media & the establishment will judge the amount of money we’re able to raise as a show of strength for our progressive movement**
* **It’s our last fundraising goal before the primary and it’s critical we raise the resources we need to compete**

**[So please believe us when we say your support has never mattered more to us. Will you chip in $5 or anything you can spare today to help us hit our $20,000 goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16427946/174485033/198088406?refcode=em20200323&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGY1YWM1ZC00ZjZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0CrnI8LmFydodepZZIUS8ag3BZcJNr33NsRZU3IIr4Q=)**
Glad to be in this fight with you,
Team Booker

clean_body: To be honest with you, we’re not sure if we’ll hit this goal in time. It’s going to take a team effort these next couple of days if we want to catch up and get back on pace. We need your help. We're asking our grassroots community to raise $20,000 by next Tuesday, the biggest fundraising deadline of the campaign. To be honest with you, with the way our fundraising numbers have been looking, we’re not sure if we’ll hit this goal in time. It’s going to take a team effort these next couple of days if we want to catch up and get back on pace. = **= Reaching this goal is critical to the future of our campaign and our chances to defeat Mitch. We've only gotten this far thanks to generous supporters like you, but we're going to need our supporters to step up again if we want to keep fighting. The bottom line is that we can’t afford to not reach this goal. Now that the election has been pushed one month later, our campaign needs more resources than we anticipated to fight through this primary The media & the establishment will judge the amount of money we’re able to raise as a show of strength for our progressive movement It’s our last fundraising goal before the primary and it’s critical we raise the resources we need to compete = Glad to be in this fight with you, Team Booker **=** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas=20for=20Texas=20House?=
subject: Campaign Update
body:
We are entering an unprecedented time in our state's history, but I'm confident that we are going to come out stronger than ever before! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/campaign-update-march-23-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=10d509671f&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends,

For many of us around Texas, this has been a very trying week. We are entering an unprecedented time in our state's history, but I'm confident that we are going to come out stronger than ever before!

While my campaign is still very much moving at full steam, we temporarily have shifted our focus away from public events to social media and technology-based campaigning. Please stay tuned to our [Facebook](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e5b9cd52e3&e=4f010155df), [Twitter](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=da9683f1d6&e=4f010155df), and [Instagram](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=7a0458242f&e=4f010155df) accounts for more details.

See below for a recap of the past week on my campaign, including a link to a recent podcast interview, pictures from my pharmacy, news updates, and tips to stay safe.

I hope that you all remain healthy, calm and watch out for each other in the coming days and weeks.

God Bless!

\- Will
---
|
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=a99c592211&e=4f010155df)
---
The Big Texas Podcast - Ep 30 - Will Douglas (HD 113): "Will Douglas is a young business owner who has seen first hand what burdensome regulations can do to an entrepreneur. Since the Coronavirus outbreak, the owner of several pharmacies struggled with the same tough decisions like every other small business owner, with the added twist of needing to continue providing health care to his customers. He's also the Republican candidate for Texas House District 113 and until recently, was working hard to get better acquainted with the communities in the district. Now, he's suspended his campaign to focus on his business, his employees and maintaining a standard of care for the patients who visit one of his pharmacies."
|
---
|
---
At the beginning of this week, after much thought and consideration, I made the difficult decision to close down walk-in business at my pharmacies. I will always do my best to ensure the health and safety of my teams so we can continue to provide our communities with quality healthcare. Community pharmacies like mine are uniquely positioned to be on the front lines of combating the spread of this virus.
|
---
|
---
Operating on the front lines of the COVID-19 outbreak, pharmacies like mine can't completely close due to the critical care we provide for patients and communities. Pharmacy student interns play crucial roles in patient care at pharmacies and, unfortunately, due to burdensome internal university rules across the state they aren't being allowed to volunteer during this outbreak. I was on the phone numerous times earlier this week with UT Tyler College of Pharmacy, the Texas Pharmacy Association and the Alliance of Independent Pharmacists of Texas to solve this problem. And on Friday, I was excited to share the news that UT Tyler will be sending volunteer 4th year students out immediately to assist community pharmacies in providing high-quality care to patients. I hope to see other universities follow their lead & I will continue to advocate for positive change.
|
---
| _**News Updates on COVID-19**_
* **Global:**[Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=ead9162dcb&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 11 a.m. CT: 353,692 \-- Total deaths: 15,436.
* **U.S.:** [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e5f10ec310&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 11 a.m. CT: 35,345 \-- Total deaths: 473.
* **Texas** : [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=3ee6ce02ef&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 11 a.m. CT: 334 -- Total deaths: 7.
* **Texas update:** On Thursday, Gov. Abbott [issued](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=de6baf87d5&e=4f010155df) an executive order instructing Texans to practice social distancing, limit social gatherings to under 10 people, close gyms and restaurants except for take-out or delivery, prohibit unnecessary visits to nursing homes, and temporarily close schools.
* **Dallas County update:** Dallas County residents are being [ordered](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=5d3840e5c3&e=4f010155df) to stay in their homes except for crucial work and errands, beginning at 11:59 p.m. Monday. All businesses that aren’t deemed essential also must stop operating.
* **Federal government latest:** Trump administration [signals](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=fc7ae4e87a&e=4f010155df) it may loosen restrictions on businesses after 15-day social distancing policy ends.
* **Markets update:** Federal Reserve [announced](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=32950a9c94&e=4f010155df) broad slate of programs to make sure credit flows to businesses and consumers.
* **Olympics update:** [Delay](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=04f802f58f&e=4f010155df) of 2020 Tokyo Olympics seems inevitable.

---
|
---
| _**Why we need to stay home to"Flatten the Curve" **_
---
|
---
By staying home and "flattening the curve", we can bring down the rate of exposure and help reduce pressure on the healthcare system in order to help those that need it the most: America's Greatest Generation and the vulnerable. Show your compassion, selflessness, and generosity towards one another by staying home. We are all Texans and need to come together and take this approach to help our friends, family, and neighbors!

**And finally, some tips to keep yourself and others safe:**
* Wash your hands frequently
* Don’t touch your face, mouth, or eyes
* Stay home if you are feeling ill & call your doctor
* Stay away from those who are sick
* Go to [www.dshs.state.tx.us/coronavirus/](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=7043f93eed&e=4f010155df) to ensure you are getting the facts about the virus

For Texas,

Will Douglas
|
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=9feeaa4caa&e=4f010155df "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=3b209b3618&e=4f010155df)
---

---
| | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0c5f2830a6&e=4f010155df)
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Will Douglas for TexasPO Box 496955Garland, TX 75049-6955
[Add us to your address book](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df&c=45eb5c337c).

name: Team Tina
subject: Ten years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
It’s the 10th anniversary of the Affordable Care Act — and the law has never been more necessary than it is during this public health emergency. More than 20 million Americans gained coverage and insurers could no longer deny or drop coverage because of a pre-existing condition. This unprecedented crisis only underscores the need for the ACA and its protections for people with pre-existing conditions. **That’s why we must protect and expand the ACA, including all of its protections.** **[If you agree, add your name to our petition to protect our health care and ensure affordable coverage for millions of Americans in this moment of crisis. There’s never been a more important time to take action.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16429410/174501417/1866781905?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjc4ZWUwOS01NzZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bfZKG0nX8kqH65thkPIHTO7h8Xh5UevyUjcYhXNOJm8=&emci=d578ee09-576d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d678ee09-576d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)** | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16429411/174501418/1866781905?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjc4ZWUwOS01NzZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bfZKG0nX8kqH65thkPIHTO7h8Xh5UevyUjcYhXNOJm8=&emci=d578ee09-576d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d678ee09-576d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)
---
People should never have to worry about being able to take care of themselves if they get sick or being able to afford to stay healthy.
Today’s anniversary is an important reminder of why that must extend to everyone — not just right now, but always.
Take care of yourselves.
— Team Tina
P.S. We know this is a difficult time for many folks. If you’d like to receive less emails during this public health crisis, **[please click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16429412/174501419/704600832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjc4ZWUwOS01NzZkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bfZKG0nX8kqH65thkPIHTO7h8Xh5UevyUjcYhXNOJm8=&emci=d578ee09-576d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d678ee09-576d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)**

clean_body: | It’s the 10th anniversary of the Affordable Care Act — and the law has never been more necessary than it is during this public health emergency. More than 20 million Americans gained coverage and insurers could no longer deny or drop coverage because of a pre-existing condition. This unprecedented crisis only underscores the need for the ACA and its protections for people with pre-existing conditions. That’s why we must protect and expand the ACA, including all of its protections. | People should never have to worry about being able to take care of themselves if they get sick or being able to afford to stay healthy. Today’s anniversary is an important reminder of why that must extend to everyone — not just right now, but always. Take care of yourselves. — Team Tina P.S. We know this is a difficult time for many folks. If you’d like to receive less emails during this public health crisis, Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Tips for social distancing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
_****_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3CImMqXMh1jDM7i-I8UJ7CWvOAmaMSKJmZy-kwPYmaY=/olYFQcqbebGQvqpYziY-jzpwVcUPSYDNtQ97P5pZh18=)
The coronavirus pandemic has placed us in uncharted territory. For many, the unknowability of these next few weeks may feel overwhelming and anxiety-provoking. If nothing else, your daily structure likely looks much different than it did just a few short weeks ago.
Maybe you're working remotely for the first time or you have kids who are temporarily being homeschooled. Whatever the changes in your day-to-day life, I hope you're taking every precaution to avoid and prevent the spread of COVID-19, by social distancing at home if you can, washing your hands often, and avoiding touching your face.
**With that said, here are some useful tips and links for adjusting to this temporary new normal:**
We know working from home can be a difficult transition if you're not used to it. LinkedIn is a great resource with useful video guides that will help you structure your time and get the most out of your workday:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3CImMqXMh1jDM7i-I8UJ7CWvOAmaMSKJmZy-kwPYmaY=/pe2vn0DOcaIPwF650AzkIz_wEV4AHrDW-ZysC2-hCDY=)
If you have kids who are now learning remotely, take note from these homeschooling pros:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3CImMqXMh1jDM7i-I8UJ7CWvOAmaMSKJmZy-kwPYmaY=/ftRhWAF6glZLpcYqs9k7xEoY91no0zyuO06qlFu4U5c=)
If you have younger kids who are craving crafts or who need to be kept entertained, here's a nifty list of projects that will keep your little ones engaged:
[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/3CImMqXMh1jDM7i-I8UJ7CWvOAmaMSKJmZy-kwPYmaY=/6JhOJh7DaYvCTcEN57wEe4_8C4GXg1ejm-9oTkdHVUk=)
And, lastly, please don't forget to take care of yourself. Whether that means going for a walk, trying to meditate, or cooking a filling and nutritious meal, make sure you're looking after your mind, body, and spirit during this time. If you already have a gym membership, check if they're offering online classes. The link below also gives a great overview of how to stay healthy and mindful while social distancing.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3CImMqXMh1jDM7i-I8UJ7CWvOAmaMSKJmZy-kwPYmaY=/ZN8Ad1ymdkK64LcYVNyNHdNSln8GfYW_ABfFcd16GRA=)
**And, of course, stay connected! Now, is the best time to call and check up on family, friends, and neighbors. We 'll get through this far, far better if we keep each other in mind.**
Stay well,
\-- _Congresswoman S anchez_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3CImMqXMh1jDM7i-I8UJ7CWvOAmaMSKJmZy-kwPYmaY=/bvWa4d81VK6-vLxk5lRHTj6tcZwHz3X6mUeGE9ZpdBY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3CImMqXMh1jDM7i-I8UJ7CWvOAmaMSKJmZy-kwPYmaY=/zYpjKDoi6BPl7jI1dahHyW_mN9MhEr0RNBM3j3UnzmA=)

**For more information about COVID-19, including official updates, please visit _[https://www.cdc.gov/](https://act.myngp.com/el/3CImMqXMh1jDM7i-I8UJ7CWvOAmaMSKJmZy-kwPYmaY=/YwzGb_6f2ikeuPvjURSujhfKhObemTjSzl1jvoecofI=)_**

Paid for by Stand with Sánchez

subject: Local distillery makes hand sanitizer for first responders
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress
body:

| Friends, In case you missed it over the weekend, I wanted to share with you this great article about my friend Brian Ferguson from the Flag Hill Distillery in Lee who distilled 5-gallon containers of sanitizer to be distributed free of charge to fire and police departments around NH!
This is exactly the kind of community response that makes this the best place in the country to live and I couldn't be prouder to call Brian a friend! Here in New Hampshire small businesses do big things! I was lucky enough to help Brian with this effort last week, and we will be back at it this week, hopefully with an even bigger supply. If you know a town in need of sanitizer please let me know at [mattmayberrynh@gmail.com](mailto:mattmayberrynh@gmail.com) or [603-969-7077](tel:603-969-7077) and we will drop it off to them free of charge. Check out the article below: \- Matt

---
**LEE, N.H. —** Flag Hill Distillery and Winery has joined several New Hampshire distilleries in adapting its operations to fill a need during the coronavirus crisis through the production and distribution of hand sanitizer to first responders. Owner Brian Ferguson said Friday he saw a need when reports of outlets running dry of sanitizer emerged last week. “It just seems like the right thing to do,” he said. With the help of friend Matt Mayberry, a former Dover city councilor who is now a Republican candidate for Congress, Ferguson and his team at Flag Hill have been filling 5-gallon containers with sanitizer for delivery to fire departments and first responders throughout the state.
| [Read more](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzgzNTAyMzg1MjIwOTQ5OTMwJmM9azVoMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzA3ODIzNjAmZD11MGo5ejVj.7tf1oEzlGcAAoz3-4pGE3ZYb_RUlwQME8o4Fda0UIh4)

|
#
_We know this is a difficult time, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones and only pitch in if you can afford to do so. * John's opponent, Cory Gardner is the **most vulnerable Republican Senator** up for re-election this year, according to several national outlets.

* That makes John's race **our best chance to flip a Republican-held seat** and take back the Senate majority for Democrats.

* **BUT** Gardner can count on Trump, McConnell, and their special interests buddies to swoop in with big checks to attack John and prop up Gardner.

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: three things (senate race alert)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, there are three things I need you to know about this race:
* Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats CAN take back the Senate, and it could all come down to Georgia.
* My wealthy Republican opponent is spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this seat - and the GOP has named me a top target.
* Our campaign is fueled by grassroots donations, but we still need to raise $10,968 by midnight to stay on track to hit our monthly goal.

I'm running for Senate to flip Georgia blue and end Mitch McConnell's majority once and for all - but I can't win without you, friend. Please, with so much on the line in this election, **can you give $5 or more now to help us win in Georgia and take back the Senate? **

name: Brandon, Team Christy
subject: New plan: All Vote by Mail
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We are in unprecedented times.

For the first time in California, this special election will be held entirely via vote by mail. The county registrars will be mailing every registered voter a ballot.

That means that voting starts for everyone in a month. We are going to need to do something that has never been done before.

Using only digital campaign tools, we are going to need to identify our voters and get them to return their ballots. That means investing in new organizing tools, targeted digital ads, and virtual events.

**[We have no time to lose. If you can right now, will you help encourage voters to safely cast their ballot by mail by chipping in $5 or whatever you can afford?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa129/2862504891/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjNfdmJtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200323_vbm-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa12a/2862504891/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjNfdmJtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200323_vbm-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa12b/2862504891/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjNfdmJtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200323_vbm-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa124/2862504891/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjNfdmJtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200323_vbm-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa125/2862504891/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjNfdmJtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200323_vbm-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa126/2862504891/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjNfdmJtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200323_vbm-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa129/2862504891/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjNfdmJtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200323_vbm-full")
Voter turnout for special elections is typically lower than on a regularly scheduled election day, but now that most ballots will be cast through the mail, we might see different results.

We need to make sure folks stay engaged in this election while we are weathering this pandemic. Every day, we are doing all that we can to remind people in our district why Christy is the best candidate for Congress and why we need to elect her this May (and then again in November!).

It isn't going to be easy, not with the national Republican special interests pouring resources in to try and steal this seat.

**[Pitch in now to help with voter outreach!](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa129/2862504891/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjNfdmJtLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200323_vbm-full")**

Thanks so much, and stay safe out there.

\-- Brandon

Brandon Zavala
Campaign Manager

P.S. If you live in the district and need to update your voter registration mailing address, click below:
[LA County Vote-By-Mail Registration](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa127/2862504891/VEsP/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.lavote.net/home/voting-elections/voting-options/vote-by-mail/apply-to-vote-by-mail")
[Ventura County Vote-By-Mail Registration](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8fe/29776869/ae7b8ff/569fa120/2862504891/VEsHBQ/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://recorder.countyofventura.org/elections/elections/voter-information/vote-by-mail/")

name: Doyle Canning
subject: Stay at Home Order is Here: Time for Neighbor Connect
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
We need you to join us for mass calling and texting outreach to check in on how our neighbors are holding up, provide up to date public health information, and share contact information for grassroots groups in our area who are providing grocery delivery, | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DgE/ni0YAA/t.30b/_8mdsyoXSbKK17gBHpo7ig/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH71814Ys7u1StnhR9AtORHa8GeXOBMyGXbHLRgCBru2dD2eXjPOiZ-2BClzKRx-2FJuBk1DNrUwMDuZdhCb-2BY0S7rZrpjCsqe8-2FH2WaC3lxTyjhYZE-2FSSuA5ib-2BlnckuaFqksbmeVAHLC74V5LzCZs5XWgJ3Qv-2BCkWPF3ZYc4EsljK3mEd5B-2FfPWmb2irjYR5V5Aqjpt/KJHf)
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DgE/ni0YAA/t.30b/_8mdsyoXSbKK17gBHpo7ig/h1/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCwdNCmiXVpj-2FFRwq9Kff41x6uZ9mnhMOjzW-2Fkc1oUzmWtJAKR7PoWogmomCkPBf6xFmE4XYw5SOnCUiUgbbQNod8pPegJT1s4ympFRGIHF-2FaqC0-2FDOK5X5Kaefo4lykfVYIqfF0j-2BM2Iyn6NxNnrEzC5abUOZPsB-2Fv3wHKdfiaVO-2FeY-2Br3zGaViiE-2FJHM-2BeRJeRYS6RIqmKzpPNygk8G1iviZi8R7IygsEmpktLFQ7-2FwyJ0-2FTJfXm8TAQAGRg6nexkvVFiLzOyggKM-2FObiVOlJ9/vBi0)
---
Hi Friend, As a lifelong community organizer, I knew that when the COVID 19 crisis hit, we had to devote whatever organizing resources we had to a grassroots response, focused on serving the needs and wellbeing of our community. [**Neighbor Connect**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DgE/ni0YAA/t.30b/_8mdsyoXSbKK17gBHpo7ig/h2/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCwdNCmiXVpj-2FFRwq9Kff41x9sg6E0U7oewe38CZCZG9QnWfwv-2F0lx-2FPK2lOP-2FmMHBVeXOsNiUlIiqyMhjDP4N2FJAEPJ1yCZX3UYvF1U-2BocHetLO-2B5ewyMTbeDDJoX0X8uaTSXEgLYX0fc5q0xFvPyooxBvKFRdrUUhc0tpibjM6DQzlW-2ByRMN0-2BfLH5oPSzqlGrBuBvWahgLcSDJXgrdnSDZhvijyZVA15yGgJASKG1Msr6TIJ7WTjhPIc3DqQfIVF0kcVCwL5LhVhtIac0JA4/QeuC) is our initiative to activate our supporters to call and text their neighbors, regardless of political affiliation, all across southwest Oregon to support one another during this challenging time. We need you to join us for mass calling and texting outreach to check in on how our neighbors are holding up, provide up to date public health information, and share contact information for grassroots groups in our area who are providing grocery delivery, distributing hand sanitizer, expanded emergency food pantries, and more.
---
[ **JOIN TODAY** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DgE/ni0YAA/t.30b/_8mdsyoXSbKK17gBHpo7ig/h3/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCwdNCmiXVpj-2FFRwq9Kff41xpe42p8LvUJOV-2F9NFy0YHtz5isfYTEFtEhDprjpwhtuXhc2x8jl6taDw5n94pAUsECq6TirTycOX1Ai-2FCeM3oL3lSCPlCFUbCa1gaNAoPd7rWebaRAVg6o8yVS7ca72-2BmX-2B-2BtvT93AylzOc9Oo-2F4PHOJ56uYBiJfCivSpMxllmjtWDW73qP-2BxhiWAWwdXgH1RdLm2rBD-2Fww-2BiefxgGv5E3nOudEuHTTHum8JExgnWXEaHCxUr6l9ksFLKWKhclSbz/U2fN)
---
I'm sure you have questions about how this works. We're adapting and building this as we go, and **our first training is**[ **tomorrow, Tuesday March 24 at 4 PM via zoom.** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DgE/ni0YAA/t.30b/_8mdsyoXSbKK17gBHpo7ig/h4/OMqVwN4xNkvSR-2FWqj-2FZ30pkPPo6Fjj-2FgKf-2B-2Fj7rPqM5xOlVhbQjq99rQDobb12wTxs2ysSqpbxrb6sP4b0E42Ht3i5v75ZJe8u4RDUACD3VMWCD2n-2BHvwyRr7jF-2FYkiJWvD-2FZJIV4EDHuyZzKU-2F1rSLM4GIl-2FZIDqNZk9DrhHcJbR1z8Fs-2BZOuxXNCF5S2TJaTxfwsp05t9eOPTZPi1CAr68Dv54qNo9HqlRAyJCfnRvuUclGSMHPkV4602irVG5lYifdH8qs2HCrk83xn5CG-2BS0vDds2nOzHOIFCv5u25Ou1XekJkorvO5sGeMX-2BnI9MYmdUmsxRPy5e2UiTRsAJOZWgt-2Frw-2FwArtEOFkTORTg-3D/JVT1) Please join us to learn:
* How to talk to your neighbors about the COVID 19 Crisis.
* How to use our power dialer, from home, to call 50 neighbors or more in one hour.
* How to use our text messaging platform to send 100 text messages+ an hour within your zip code.
* The key public health information we will be blasting through these networks.
* What grassroots groups and service agencies in our area are offering resources, and how to connect neighbors in need with those services.
* How you can help our community be resilient and connected in the face of this unprecedented crisis.

This training will repeat weekly, or more frequently, as needed. We are building a network and we will provide the training to make this an easy and empowering way to help, right now. [Can you sign up to volunteer now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DgE/ni0YAA/t.30b/_8mdsyoXSbKK17gBHpo7ig/h5/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCwdNCmiXVpj-2FFRwq9Kff41xqMBYIT5SDxpG9ofAVAnucb-2BjQ5XjO4Ex60hHHjml3cq5izr4uLq6ZgL3Iz-2F64yb4TqdLeLQ3KmMcWwio7rkz1RnjLMJ-2Bsniqsan7qceO1p8-2BVQa5pfdadl0owqV-2B9gLz3G4H1WaLaDokWKn-2BB-2Ft4fobAiM-2Fs-2F5Mr0DqupsPbFnI5MIlzJ-2Bxn248mZrZA2nq-2F-2BJBUIN8ZSOysTRRNG-2B-2B7OZLW8fYpYn83DKuZPNzbTM6kVYNImQC-2BvPDubB68XsUf/48DL) We are devoting the resources we have to connecting our community because we know that the only way through this crisis is together, and lives are at stake. This is a moment that will define us - as individuals, as leaders, and as a country. It's time to serve and to lead with our values. Now is the time for us to unite across our differences, check in on our friends and neighbors to share resources, and to make sure no one is left alone or left behind. Onward, Doyle Canning
---
|
